column1: # topic-migration-map.tsv — T4 review artifact for the docs topic restructure
# One row per doc (289 total). Columns are TAB-separated:
#   route        : frozen absolute URL (Phase A) — UNCHANGED by any move
#   draft        : 1 if draft:true (excluded from prod build)
#   inbound      : count of /docs/ body links pointing at this doc's route
#   sub          : sub-group hint (prompts | vocabulary | roles | culture | skills | '')
#   target_path  : PROPOSED destination under docs/ (refined per-topic in Phase D)
# SAFETY: every doc's slug is frozen to an absolute /docs route (Phase A), so moving a
# file changes ONLY its sidebar position, never its URL. Each Phase-D move is verified
# by asserting the route-manifest diff vs baseline is EMPTY.
#   · personal-growth 13. Plus 7 no-move: welcome (root) + 6 dissolving bucket READMEs
#     instead ADD a new interview-prep doc that references level/skill differences as prep.
#   - vocabulary consolidated: CLI/dev/PM/acronyms/emojis -> Productivity; blog/portfolio -> Development.
# OPEN per-topic refinements (decided DURING the Phase-D move of each topic, by eyeballing
# the sidebar — target_path here is the starting proposal, not final):
#     "-techniques" framing word is now implied by the topic. Keep genuinely useful
#   - GenAI pulls from 6 source roots -> regroup its 18 docs into ~3 clean sub-groups
#     (e.g. fundamentals / building-systems / my-genai-workflow) instead of echoing the
#   - Faith: reframe backend-projects/home-automation nesting to faith-centric grouping.
#   - Bucket-A broken category links + numeric prefixes + _category_.json labels: T14.
